headline: 暑期档预热，新片蓄势待发
headlineEn: Summer Season Heats Up with New Films on the Horizon
summary: 今日无新片上映，本周《痴迷》《福尔摩斯小姐3》领跑热搜，暑期档大片《安昂传奇》《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》即将来袭。
summaryEn: No new releases today; this week's trending hits include 'Obsession' and 'Enola Holmes 3', with summer blockbusters 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' and 'Spider-Man: Fresh New Day' on the way.

industryHighlights.text: 《无职转生》异世界动画持续高热
industryHighlights.en: 'Mushoku Tensei' isekai anime continues to trend high

industryHighlights.text: 《末日地堡》科幻剧集引发讨论
《权力的游戏前传：龙族》稳居本周热搜
industryHighlights.en: 'House of the Dragon' remains a weekly top trend
